entity.summary: Internet Computer decentralized exchange built around concentrated-liquidity AMM pools, token swaps, custom price-range liquidity positions, limit orders, pool creation, and wallet-integrated trading flows.
entity.notes: Current first-party application and public ICPSwap-Labs repositories support active DEX classification. HEI consolidates duplicate registry rows and the V3 service implementation under one ICPSwap exchange entity.

evidence.title: ICPSwap application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application endpoint is reachable and exposes the active ICPSwap trading frontend.

evidence.title: ICPSwap frontend repository
evidence.notes: First-party organization repository contains the ICPSwap frontend application and current swap UI code, including trading-pair selection, swaps, liquidity actions, limit orders, price impact, TVL, pools, and transaction-related surfaces.

evidence.title: ICPSwap Service V3
evidence.notes: First-party V3 service documentation identifies ICPSwap V3 as a Uniswap V3-style concentrated-liquidity AMM on Internet Computer supporting custom price ranges, swaps, liquidity management, limit orders, deposits, withdrawals, pool creation, and wallet consent integration.
